hero.title: AIGC Fashion Photography
hero.description: Transform your garment photos into stunning fashion photography and videos with AI-generated models. Create professional clothing brand photoshoots, apparel photography for e-commerce, and dynamic fashion content—no models or photographers needed.

steps.title: Upload your garment image
steps.description: Provide a flat-lay or mannequin photo of your clothing item. Our AI will analyze the garment's style, color, and details to create the perfect fashion photography.

steps.title: AI generates fashion model photos
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro creates stunning on-model images with AI-generated fashion models that perfectly showcase your garments in professional poses and settings.

steps.title: Create dynamic fashion videos
steps.description: Transform your AI-generated fashion photos into captivating videos using Seedance, perfect for social media ads, lookbooks, and e-commerce product pages.

steps.title: Download and publish
steps.description: Export high-resolution fashion photos and videos ready for your online store, social media campaigns, and marketing materials. Start selling with professional fashion content.

items.question: What is the AIGC Fashion Photography workflow?
items.answer: It's an AI-powered workflow that transforms garment photos into professional fashion photography and videos. Using Nano Banana Pro for image generation and Seedance for video creation, it generates realistic on-model fashion content without hiring models or photographers.

items.question: What kind of garment images work best?
items.answer: Flat-lay photos, mannequin shots, or clean product images work best. The AI can handle various clothing types including dresses, tops, pants, outerwear, and accessories. Higher quality input images produce better results.

items.question: Can I choose the model's appearance and pose?
items.answer: The AI automatically selects appropriate models and poses based on your garment style. The workflow is optimized to showcase your clothing in the most flattering way for e-commerce and marketing purposes.

items.question: What video formats can I create?
items.answer: The workflow generates vertical videos (9:16) perfect for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and mobile e-commerce. Videos feature dynamic movement and transitions that bring your fashion content to life.

items.question: How long does it take to generate fashion content?
items.answer: Photo generation typically takes 1-2 minutes, while video creation takes 2-5 minutes depending on complexity. The entire workflow from garment upload to final video can be completed in under 10 minutes.

items.question: Is the AI-generated content suitable for commercial use?
items.answer: Yes, all generated content is fully licensed for commercial use including e-commerce listings, social media marketing, paid advertising, and print materials.

items.question: Can I maintain brand consistency across multiple products?
items.answer: Yes, the workflow produces consistent visual style across your product line, helping build brand recognition and a cohesive shopping experience for customers.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: Each generation consumes credits based on the AI models used. Creating a complete fashion photo and video set costs a fraction of traditional photography, making professional content accessible to businesses of all sizes.
